description: We have been using the Loadium product actively for 3 years and on a daily basis with my whole team. We can easily track our performance reports. In terms of support, we can get a very fast response, most of the time, our problem is solved by the Loadium team within a maximum of 1 hour.

pros: - Ease of use - JMeter Integrated & Plugin Support - Postman-Jmeter Convertion Tool - APM Tools Support - Advance Reporting Features - AWS Based
